events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce JSON answer. Need parse scenario. We are to compare field condition: freeze-frame interpretation (DOC: read the scan tool screenshot). But no actual screenshot or data provided in prompt. We have only scenario description. Need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. Since no scan tool screenshot provided, cannot interpret freeze frame. Work is through testing/inspection. We need assess diagnostics. Without actual data, decision likely needs_more_info. But maybe scenario expects fail because freeze-frame interpretation not done correctly? However no document details. We must apply reference material: OEM service info, OBD-II standards. Need produce JSON with fields. Need include findings: missing scan tool screenshot/data; unable to verify freeze-frame parameters against DTC; no timestamp, VIN, etc. Actions: provide scan tool screenshot, DTC list, freeze frame data, compare to OEM service info. Risk maybe medium because incorrect diagnosis could lead to wrong repair. Component conditions: installed-defective? Since observed field condition is freeze-frame interpretation, component may be installed-defective if DTC indicates malfunction. But we don't know. Could list installed-defective as possible? The schema says component condition categories that may apply. Since scenario says categories that may apply: installed-defective. We can include it as suspected. But if no evidence, maybe empty. However scenario explicitly says Component condition categories that may apply: installed-defective. So include it. Work_stage tested/inspected. percent_complete maybe 80. value 0 (no numeric reading). confidence low because missing data. event_time 0, rate 0, order empty, workable empty. Findings: no freeze-frame data supplied; diagnostic conclusion cannot be validated; risk of misdiagnosis. Actions: obtain scan tool screenshot, verify DTC and freeze frame parameters, compare to OEM service info, confirm failure mode. Rationale: without the documented freeze-frame screenshot and DTC context, cannot determine if interpretation is correct; need data to compare against OBD-II standards and OEM service info. References: SAE J1979 (OBD-II freeze frame), OEM service info. Decision: needs_more_info. Risk: medium. Need ensure valid JSON. No prose outside JSON.

  "actions": [

    "Re-evaluate the diagnostic conclusion once the documented data is available."
  ],
  "rationale": "The assessment depends on reading and interpreting the scan tool freeze-frame screenshot, but the actual data was not supplied. Without the DTC and freeze-frame parameters, the work cannot be compared to OEM service information or OBD-II standards, so a pass/fail determination is not possible.",

  ]
